reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 오홍! 신상품이 나와서 사봤어요! 우리집 댕댕공쥬는 엄빠가 나갈 준비하고 간식을 주면 먹고 혼자 잘 쉬기 때문에 그 때 주기에 딱 맞는 간식입니당❤️ 이번 간식도 성공❤️ 포장지 뜯자마자 빨리 달라고 쳐다보는 귀야운 뽕이이이이 너무 귀여워ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Ooh! A new product came out so I bought it! 💕 Our little princess Ppong loves it—whenever we prep to leave and give her a treat, she eats it and rests well on her own, so this snack is perfect for those moments! ❤️ This one's a winner too! ❤️ She stares at me so eagerly the second I open the wrapper—our sweet Ppong is just too cute ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 일단 테스트로 구매 해봤어요! 델탈껌 엄청 좋아해서 배송오자마자 신나서 킁킁 간식박스인건 어찌 알았을까? 포장은 사람이 먹는 에너지바 같이 생겼어요.먹으면 힘이 날것 같은 느낌적인 느낌.. 신나서 물고가는 보리 너무 잘 먹네요 기호성 체크완료!
reviews.content_en: I bought it as a test first! She absolutely loves the Delta chews, and the moment the package arrived she was so excited sniffing around—how did she even know it was a treat box? 😄 The packaging looks just like an energy bar for humans. It has that vibe like it'll give you energy when you eat it... Boरी is gobbling it up excitedly and eating it so well! Palatability check complete! ✓

reviews.name: N****
reviews.content:
애들이 환장하고 먹네요!
개별포장이라 너무 편하고 위생적이에요
좀 딱딱하긴 하지만 손으로 잘라서 줄수있어요
reviews.content_en:
The kids are absolutely obsessed with these! 🐕
They come individually wrapped so it's super convenient and hygienic.
They're a bit hard, but you can cut them with your hands if needed.

reviews.name: 위****
reviews.content:
정말 다른 말로 형용이 안되고.
사월이가 원래 간식을 좋아하긴 하지만 이렇게 환장하고 먹는건 처음 봤어요💖 바잇미 간식 최고~흥해랏 에너지바
사월이한테 일용할 간식을 만들어주신 바잇미에게 이런 영광을 드립니다!!
reviews.content_en:
I really can't describe it any other way.
Sayul usually likes treats, but I've never seen her go crazy for something like this before! 💖 BITE ME treats are the best~ The energy bar is amazing!
I'm honored to present such a wonderful treat to Sayul—thank you BITE ME for creating a daily snack for her!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
선물받아서 먹여봤는데 너무 잘먹어서 구매해봅니다!
간단하게 가지고 다니기도 좋은것같아요
reviews.content_en:
We got it as a gift and tried it, and she ate it so well that I'm buying it myself now!
It seems really convenient to carry around too.

reviews.name: J****
reviews.content:
잘 받았습니다 
애정하는 강아지 용품 판매업체중에 
바잇미를 좋아하는데요 
바잇미 에서 나오는 출시제품들은 
매번 믿고 구매하고 있어요 
애기들이 잘 먹어서 신제품 구매해 봅니다 
항상 믿을수 있는 제품으로 잘 만들어주세요
reviews.content_en:
Received it safely! 😊
Among the dog product brands I love,
I'm a big fan of BITE ME.
I trust and repurchase every new product BITE ME releases.
The pups eat them so well, so I'm buying the new product.
Please continue making reliable products we can trust!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 처음사봤는데 환장하고 먹네요ㅋ 에너지바먹고 힘내렴 버들
reviews.content_en: First time buying and she's absolutely going crazy for it lol 😂 Eat this energy bar and get energized, Buddle! 💪

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 잘먹어서 두개더샀어요 ! 관절에도 좋다고하니 자주맥일게요
reviews.content_en: She eats them so well I bought two more! 🐕 Since they're good for joints too, I'll give them to her regularly!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 같개로 샀다가 아이가 너무 좋아해서 박스로 구매했어요
reviews.content_en: I bought one at first, and my pup loved it so much I ended up ordering a whole box! 📦

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 첫째가 잘 먹어요. 첫째는 씹는 거 좋아하는 아이에요. 둘째는 씹는 거 싫어하는 아이라 그런지 겉만 빨아먹고 안 먹네요 ㅋㅋㅋ 첫째는 너무 잘 먹어요. 한 개 순삭♡ 담에 첫째용으로 또 살께요♡
reviews.content_en: My first dog eats them really well. She's a dog that loves to chew. My second dog hates chewing though, so she just sucks on the outside and doesn't eat the rest lol 😂 But my first one eats them so well—gone in no time! ♡ I'll definitely buy more for my first pup next time ♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기호성 정말 정말 대박이에요! 
입 까다롭고 아무거나 잘 안먹는 강아지들도 다이너바이트 주면 환장 할 것 같아요 >.<
개별 포장되어 있어서 놀러갈때나 산책할때 무조건 들고 나가요! 
정말 강력추천입니다 💚
reviews.content_en:
The palatability is absolutely amazing! 😍 Even picky eaters who don't eat just anything seem to go crazy for DINE BITE >.<
Since they come individually wrapped, I always bring them when I go out or on walks!
I really recommend this product! 💚

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 테디 먹는 양을 늘려주려고 주문한건데 부드러워서 큰거 잘 안먹는 테디도 열심히 먹더라구요! 제가 반으로 잘라서 줬는데 확실히 부드러웠어요! 눈물이 많은 아이인데 눈에 좋은 영향 많이 줬으면 좋겠네요 :)
reviews.content_en: I ordered this to increase how much Teddy eats, and because it's soft, even Teddy who doesn't usually eat larger treats ate it eagerly! I cut it in half and it was definitely soft! Teddy has watery eyes, so I hope this has a good effect on eye health :)

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
샘플로 다른맛 온거 먹여봤는데 잘먹어서 주문해봤어요.
생각보다 단단해서 먹기 힘들어하긴 하는데 잘게 잘라서 주니까 엄청 조아해요! 통채로 먹이지는 않고 잘게 잘라서 급여하고 있습니다. 너무 조아해요
reviews.content_en:
I tried a different flavor sample and my pup ate it well, so I placed an order.
It's firmer than I expected so he struggles to eat it whole, but when I cut it into small pieces he absolutely loves it! I'm feeding it cut into small pieces rather than whole. He really loves it

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content: 입짧은 아이라 안먹을까봐 전에 맛보기로 하나씩만 시켰었는데 잘먹어서 더 많은 양으로 주문했어여 역시나 잘먹네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup has a small mouth so I was worried she wouldn't eat it, so I ordered just one as a sample first. She ate it well so I ordered a larger quantity. And sure enough, she eats it well ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: A****
reviews.content: 적당히 말랑해서 먹이기 좋고 기호성도 좋습니다 맛있는 냄새나요
reviews.content_en: It's appropriately soft so it's easy to feed, and the palatability is great too. It smells delicious

reviews.name: 뭉****
reviews.content: 너무 잘먹어요 잘라주기에도 좋고 처음 나왔을때 먹여보고 오랜만에 먹이는데 잘먹네요
reviews.content_en: He eats it so well! It's also easy to cut, and even after a long time since the first time we tried it, he still eats it great

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 다이너바이트 에너지바 어디 놀러가거나 산책갈때 하나씩 챙겨가서 주면 좋더라구용~ 기호성도 좋구 사람 에너지바마냥 기운도 충전되는것같아 좋습니당ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: DINE BITE Energy Bars are perfect to take along and give one at a time when we go out or on walks~ The palatability is good and it's like it really charges his energy just like a human energy bar ㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 우리 설이는 정말 소문난 입짧녀에 미식견이에요 야외에서는 잘 먹지 않는 설이가 봉투 소리부터 관심을 보이더니 너무 잘 먹는 거 있죠 3가지 맛 모두 기호성이 높아서 대만족합니다 개별 포장으로 산책이나 마실 나갈 때 하나씩 챙겨가고 있어요 입짧은 강아지 친구들에게 추천합니다 💕💕
reviews.content_en: Our Seol is truly famous for having a small mouth and being a picky eater. When we take her outside she usually doesn't eat much, but as soon as she heard the wrapper, she showed interest and ate it so well! All three flavors have high palatability so I'm very satisfied. I bring one individually wrapped package whenever we go on walks or outings. I recommend this to friends with small-mouthed pups 💕💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
간혹 밥을 안먹거나 덜 먹는 경우가 있어서 그럴때 주려고 맛별로 되어있는 미니 에너지바 구매했어요.
간식이라고 아는지 꺼내기만하면 신나서 빨리 달라고 재촉하네요.
그래도 이 에너지바 먹어서 그런지 밥을 더 달라거나 배고프다고 보채진 않는것 같아요.
reviews.content_en:
Sometimes my pup skips meals or eats less, so I bought these mini energy bars in different flavors for those times.
As soon as I take one out, he gets excited and rushes for it.
But since eating these energy bars, he doesn't ask for more food or whine about being hungry as much.

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
엄청 잘먹어요 ㅎㅎㅎ
놀러 나가서 출출할때 간식주기 딱 좋네용
reviews.content_en:
She eats it so well ㅎㅎㅎ
Perfect for giving as a snack when we're out and about and she gets a bit peckish

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
체험단 당첨돼서 먹여봤는데 너무 만족스러워서 재구매할거같아요
우선 기호성이 너무 좋아요!!건사료 절대 안먹고 동결건조사료랑 화식만 먹는 입짧은 댕댕인데 이건 뜯자마자 순삭했어요
그리고 성분도 좋고 국내생산이라 믿고 먹일수있겠더라구요
또 실외배변댕이라 밖에 자주 나가는데 들고다니기 너무 편해요 
산책가방에 세네개 넣어도 가볍고 친구들 나눠주기에도 개별포장이라 너무 좋아요
다들 다이너바이트바 하세요👍
reviews.content_en: I won a product testing opportunity and fed it to my pup, and I'm so satisfied that I'm planning to repurchase! First of all, my dog absolutely loves it!! My picky eater won't touch regular kibble at all and only eats freeze-dried food and fresh food, but she devoured this the second I opened it. Plus, the ingredients are great and since it's made domestically, I feel confident feeding it to her. Also, since my dog does her business outside and we go out a lot, it's so convenient to carry around. I can fit a few pieces in my walk bag and they're light, and the individual packaging is perfect for sharing with dog friends. Everyone should try DINER BITE BAR 👍

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
정말 에너지바예요.
크기도 크고 식감도 부드럽고
어제 도착해서 조금 잘라주고 정리하는데 나머지 가져다 아주 잘 먹네요~~
reviews.content_en: It's really an energy bar. The size is big and the texture is soft. It arrived yesterday and I cut a little piece to test, and my dog ate the rest really well~~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
포장이 너무 예뻐요
제가 먹고싶다구요
사람이 안 먹게 조심해야겠어요
기호성 굿 재구매하렵니등
reviews.content_en: The packaging is so pretty! I want to eat it myself! I need to be careful so my human doesn't eat it! Palatability is great and I want to repurchase!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 신상 간식! 미니 에너지마 마이너바이트 !!
바잇미 제품이라 믿고 보리에게 줬습니다! 
일단 뒤에 성분표를 보면 강아지에게 좋은 식품이 들어가서 
마음이 놓이더라구요 ! 그리고 개별포장이라 들고 다니기 좋고 위생적이였어요 .

🔹든든한 에너지바
🔹신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육
🔹진짜 중요한 HACCP 인증 시설인 안전한 국내! 제조사에서     생산!!!!!!! 

다른 좋은 점 많지만 이 3가지가 저한테는 제일 중요한 조건이였어요! 모두 충족시키는 이 간식 추천해요!! 

그리고 기호도도 높아서 제가 포장지 만지기만하면 보리가 달려와요 ㅋㅋㅋ 또 먹고싶어서 ! 

재구매의사 엄청 완전 있는 제품 입니다 🙆🏻‍♀️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME's new snack! Mini energy bar, MINOR BITE!! Since it's a BITE ME product, I gave it to Bori with confidence! First of all, looking at the ingredient list on the back, I can see it contains foods that are good for dogs, so I felt reassured! And since it's individually packaged, it's convenient to carry around and very hygienic.

🔹A hearty energy bar
🔹Fresh human-grade raw meat
🔹HACCP certified safe domestic manufacturing facility!!!!!!!

There are many other good points, but these 3 things were the most important conditions for me! I recommend this snack that meets all of them!!

And because the palatability is so high, Bori comes running just by me touching the packaging ㅋㅋㅋ She wants to eat it again!

I definitely plan to repurchase this product 🙆🏻‍♀️

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
💥바잇미에서 나온 신상 간식💥
   [미니 에너지바 다이너바이트]
뚱띠, 노랑이가 먼저 먹어보았습니다🐶

✅️ 강아지를 위한 든든한 에너지 바

✅️ 신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로‼️

✅️ HACCP 인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산

✅️ 개별포장으로 어디서든 간편하게 급여가능

✅️ 우리아이 최애 특식 기호성 최고‼️

개별포장으로 보관 편리하고 한개씩 들고
산책 나가기 좋아요
저희 아이들한텐 한입에 넣기 큰 크기라
먹기 편하게 작게 잘라주었는데 
큰 힘 안들이고 손으로도 잘 부셔지더라구요
우리 노랑이 접시 싹싹 긁어먹는거봐요😋
기호성 최고ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
울애기들 든든한 영양간식으로 굿굿👍
reviews.content_en:
💥New snack from BITE ME💥
[Mini Energy Bar DINER BITE]
Ttungtti and Norangi tried it first 🐶

✅️ A hearty energy bar for dogs
✅️ Fresh human-grade raw meat whole!!️
✅️ HACCP certified safe domestic manufacturing
✅️ Individually packaged for convenient feeding anywhere
✅️ My kids' favorite treat with top-notch palatability!!️

It's convenient to store with individual packaging and easy to take out one at a time when going for walks. My kids found the size a bit big to put in their mouths, so I cut them small, and they break apart easily even by hand without much effort. Look at my Norangi licking the plate clean 😋 Top-notch palatability ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ A hearty and nutritious treat for our babies, it's great 👍

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 자주 쇼핑하는데 체험단 돼서 
먼저 체험할 수 있어서 좋네용!!
손으로 잘 부서지기도 하구 개별포장이라 
밖에 나가면 하나씩 들고 나가서 줘도 편해요

냄새는 무슨 냄새인지 모르겠지만 
댕댕이들이 좋아하는 향기인걸루!! 
저희 강아지 코가 옴청 벌렁벌렁 난리났거든요ㅎㅎ

이번엔 전과 다른맛으로 닭고기,소고기,참치 3가지 종류!
다양한 맛으로 선택 가능해서 좋아요!
전 여러맛으로 맛보고 싶어서 믹스인 3가지 종류를
한팩씩 받았습니다:)

알러지나 댕댕이들 상태에 따라 
구매하고 급여하셔야 할 것 같아요!!
reviews.content_en:
I shop frequently at BITE ME, and it was nice being selected for product testing so I could try it first!! It breaks apart well by hand and since it's individually packaged, it's convenient to take one out and give it when I go outside.

I'm not sure what the smell is, but it's definitely a scent my doggies love!! My pup's nose was fluttering like crazy ㅎㅎ

This time it's 3 different flavors unlike before - chicken, beef, and tuna!
It's nice to have various flavor options to choose from! I wanted to try multiple flavors, so I received the mix of 3 flavors one pack each :)

You should probably consider purchasing and feeding based on allergies or your pup's condition!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
편식쟁이+입 짧음+의심많음+취향 아니면 무조건 안먹는...
아주아주 까딸스러운 입맛을 가지고 있어서 뭔가 새로 구입할 때마다 안 먹을까봐 조마조마한 마음으로 구입합니다 ㅠ

일단 다이너바이트는 맛 선택폭이 다양해서 좋아하는 맛으로 구입할 수 있어서 좋았습니다
저희 아기는 닭고기, 돼지고기, 오리고기, 소고기를 좋아해서 좋아하는 맛으로만 골라서 구입했습니다 (양고기, 연어, 황태, 해산물 불호..)
닭고기, 오리고기, 소고기 맛으로 구입했는데 모두 잘 먹습니다
입도 짧아서 금방 질려해서 여러가지 맛 돌아가면서 주고 있어요

개별 포장이 되어 있어서 산책 나갈때 하나씩 들고 가기 편하다는 점이 가장 큰 장점 같아요
따로 용기에 담아서 갈 필요 없이 그냥 하나 챙겨서 나가면 되니까 너무 편해요

원래 밖에서 뭘 잘 안 먹는데(물도 안마셔요) 다이너바이트는 그래도 주면 먹긴하더라구요ㅋㅋ

꽤나 맛있게 먹는것 같아서 다행입니다 ㅎㅎ
다 먹으면 재구매할 예정입니다~
reviews.content_en:
A picky eater + short mouth + suspicious + absolutely won't eat it if it's not their taste... He has a very finicky palate, so I'm always nervous when buying something new that he might not eat ㅠ

First, DINER BITE is great because it offers various flavor options so you can buy their favorite flavor. My baby likes chicken, pork, duck, and beef, so I only picked out the flavors he likes (doesn't like lamb, salmon, pollock, or seafood...). I bought the chicken, duck, and beef flavors and he eats all of them well. Since he has a short attention span and gets bored easily, I rotate between different flavors.

The individual packaging is probably the biggest advantage - it's convenient to take one piece when going for a walk. I don't need to put it in a separate container, just grab one and go, so it's super convenient.

He usually doesn't eat much outside (he won't even drink water), but he does eat DINER BITE when I give it to him ㅋㅋ

I'm glad he's eating it quite well ㅎㅎ I plan to repurchase once he finishes these~

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
바잇미간식 또는 제품을 애용하는 편인데 좋은 품질, 가성비 등 반려인의 마음을
잘 파악하고 만드신 것 같아서 최근에는 우비도 구매했었답니당

요번에 먹여본 다이너바이트는 HACCP인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산과
신선한 휴먼그레이드원육이 통째로 들어가있다고 해서 더욱 믿음이 갔습니다

국내산 눈에 불을 켜고 찾는 편이라 대만족!
개별 포장이라 어디든 쉽게 들고다니면서 간편하게 급여하기 좋았어요
강아지를 위한 든든한 단백질간식이라 여름보양간식으로 딱일듯합니당!

맛있게 먹는 모습만 봐도 굳이 제가 안 먹어봐도 맛있을 것 같더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋ 
쇼파까지 싹싹 핥아서 부스러기 깔끔 처리해버리네용 ㅋㅋㅋ
빈 비닐포장까지 훔쳐 달아나서 아직까지 물어뜯고 집착중입니다..ㅎㄷㄷ
reviews.content_en:
I usually use BITE ME snacks and products, and it seems like they really understand pet parents' hearts with good quality and value for money - I recently bought Ubi too!

DINER BITE that I fed this time made me even more confident because it's produced at an HACCP certified safe domestic manufacturing facility and contains fresh human-grade raw meat whole.

I specifically look for domestic products, so I'm very satisfied! Since it's individually packaged, it's easy to carry around and convenient to feed. It's a hearty protein snack for dogs, so it seems perfect as a summer nutrition snack!

Just watching him eat it deliciously makes it seem tasty without me even trying it ㅋㅋㅋ He licks the sofa so clean, cleaning up all the crumbs ㅋㅋㅋ He's even stolen the empty packaging and is still obsessed with chewing it ㅎㄷㄷ

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
바잇미에서 나온 신상 간식을 미루가 먼저 체험할 수 있게 도와주셨어요~ :)
 
첫 번째! 좋았던 부분은 개별 포장이 가능해서 외출 시 가지고 나가기 상당히 편해요! 산책 혹은 여행 시에 가지고 다니면서 급여하면 좋을 거 같아요.

두 번째! 좋았던 부분은 기호성이 좋은 거 같아요. ❤ 미루는 새로운 간식이랑 처음에 친해지는 데 시간이 걸리는데 바잇미에서 나온 미니 에너지바 다이너바이트 같은 경우에는 바로 잘 먹더라고요 ㅋㅋ 이미 최애 간식으로 등극!! YEAH !!✌🏻

세 번째! 좋았던 부분은 믿을 수 있는 바잇미에서 만들었다는 거예요. 아이들 옷 그리고 간식 등 관련된 건 어떠한 성분이 들어갔는지 그리고 어디에서 만들었는지 중요하게 보는 편이에요. HACCP 인증받은 안전한 국내 제조 시설에서 만들었다니 믿음이 갔어요. 거기에 휴먼 그레이드 원육이 통째로!! 안 사먹일 이유가 있나요~~ 맘에 들어요!!

우연히 체험단 기회로 간식을 접하게 된거지만, 이걸 다 먹이고 난 후에는 재구매 예정 1000%입니다!! 고마워요 바잇미~❤️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME's new snack helped Miru try it first~ :)

First! What I liked was that it's individually packaged, so it's very convenient to take out when going out! It would be great to carry it around during walks or trips to feed.

Second! What I liked was the good palatability ❤ Miru usually takes time to warm up to new snacks, but with BITE ME's mini energy bar DINER BITE, he ate it right away ㅋㅋ Already promoted to his favorite snack!! YEAH !!✌🏻

Third! What I liked was that it's made by trustworthy BITE ME. For kids' clothes and snacks, I pay close attention to what ingredients are in them and where they're made. I was reassured knowing it was made at an HACCP certified safe domestic manufacturing facility. And fresh human-grade raw meat all in!!  Why wouldn't I buy it~~ I'm impressed!!

I came across this snack by chance through the product testing opportunity, but after feeding all of these, I'm 1000% planning to repurchase!! Thank you BITE ME~❤️

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
다이너바이트 신제품 소고기, 참치, 닭고기맛을 먼저 먹어볼 수 있게 해주셔서 탄칸쵸가 먼저 먹어봤어요^^
⠀⠀
개별포장으로 8개씩 들어있어 휴대도 간편,
실온보관도 가능하고,
때에 따라 원하는 제품을 골라서 들고 나갈 수 있다는 게 제일 큰 장점인 것 같아요:)
⠀⠀
단면이 궁금해 잘라보았더니🙌🏻
신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로 들어있어서 그런지
단면에 콕콕콕 박힌 원물이 다 보이더라구요👀
⠀⠀
제일 궁금한 참치맛,
평소 생선을 별로 좋아하지 않는 탄칸쵸가 잘 먹을지 궁금했는데
기호성 최강👍🏻 완전 극호😍
⠀⠀
엄마가 먹는 간식이랑 비슷하게 생겨서
엄마가 뺏어먹지 않게 조심해야겠어요🤣
reviews.content_en:
I was able to let Tankancho try DINER BITE's new beef, tuna, and chicken flavors first^^

It comes with 8 pieces in individual packaging so it's portable, you can store it at room temperature, and you can choose the product you want and take it with you depending on the occasion - this seems like the biggest advantage :)

I cut it to see the cross-section 🙌🏻 Since it contains fresh human-grade raw meat whole, I could see all the raw ingredients embedded throughout the cross-section 👀

Most curious about the tuna flavor - Tankancho usually doesn't like fish much, so I was curious if he'd eat it, but top-notch palatability 👍🏻 Absolutely loves it 😍

It looks similar to a snack mom eats, so I need to be careful mom doesn't steal it 🤣

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
⠀
바잇미 미니 에너지 바 다이너바이트 신제품3종
소고기🐮닭고기🐔참치🐟
⠀
신제품은 못 참지 🤤🤤
누구보다 빠르게 신제품 체험 기회주신 #바잇미 🫶🏻
⠀
🔥강아지를 위한 든든한 에너지바
🔥신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 통째로
🔥HACCP인증 안전한 국내 제조사 생산
🔥개별포장
⠀
입맛 까다로운 차차도 눈 커지게 맛있는 최고의 기호성
애견운동장 뛰뛰 하고 더운 여름 에너지 충전 후 다시
신나게 놀수 있어서 너무나 행복 👍🏻
지금 바잇미에서 1+1+1 행사 하니 런런🏃🏻‍♀️🏃🏻‍♀️
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Mini Energy Bar DynaByте New 3 Flavors
Beef 🐮 Chicken 🐔 Tuna 🐟

Can't resist new products 🤤🤤
Thanks to #BITE ME for letting us try the new products first! 🫶🏻

🔥Solid energy bar for dogs
🔥Fresh human-grade raw meat in whole pieces
🔥Safe domestic production with HACCP certification
🔥Individual packaging

Even Chacha, who's picky about food, had her eyes light up—absolutely delicious! 😋 After recharging at the dog park on hot summer days, she can play again with endless energy! So happy 👍🏻
BITE ME is running a 1+1+1 promotion right now, so let's go! 🏃🏻‍♀️🏃🏻‍♀️

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
댕댕이들을 위한 에너지바 느낌의 간식!
휴먼그레이드 원육에  HACCP인증 국내 제조사 생산으로 믿고 먹일 수 있어요~

맛은 소고기, 닭고기, 참치맛 세 가지.
입맛이 까다로운 편이라 고민하다가
가금류를 좋아해서 닭고기맛으로 골랐는데 
우와 엄청 잘먹어요😋 기호성 좋아요!!👍

딱딱하지 않고 씹으면 부스러지는 제형이라
손으로도 잘라줄 수 있어요. ㅎㅎ

개별포장이라 산책이나 놀러갔을 때 간식으로 하나씩 까먹기도 딱 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
Energy bar-style treats for your pups!
Made with human-grade raw meat and HACCP-certified domestic production, so you can feed with confidence~

Three flavors available: beef, chicken, and tuna.
My pup is picky, so I hesitated, but since she loves poultry, I went with the chicken flavor
Wow, she absolutely devours it! 😋 Great palatability! 👍

It's not hard and crumbly when you chew it, so you can even cut it with your hands. ㅎㅎ

Since it comes in individual packages, it's perfect for grabbing one at a time when you're out on walks or trips!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
엄마랑 똑같이 저질체력인 솜이를 위해 에너지바 사드렸어요ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
처음 먹어보는 간식은 킁킁이를 한참 하다가 입에 가져가는데.. 다이너바이트는 그냥 달려드네요ㅎㅎㅎ  완전 잘먹어요!!
솜이가 급하게 먹는 아이라 반으로 잘라서 급여했는데 겉은 단단하고 안쪽은 촉촉해서 꼭꼭 잘 씹어먹으니 좋네요! 
하나씩 개별포장되어있어서 편리해요! 
카페가서 뛰뛰하기전에 먹이니까 날아다녀요 :) 하핫
reviews.content_en:
My Sommi has terrible stamina just like mom, so I got her these energy bars lol
At first with a new treat, she'd sniff for a while before eating it.. but DynaByте? She just rushes right for it! ㅎㅎㅎ Absolutely loves it!!
Since Sommi eats quickly, I cut it in half, and it's great how the outside is firm but the inside is moist, so she chews it properly! 
So convenient that it comes in individual packages! 
I give it to her before we go to the café to run around, and she's got energy flying everywhere 😄

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
처음 당첨된 체험담ㅠㅠㅠ
진짜 요즘 매일을 바잇미에서 배송받는중인데 바잇미 체험단이라니?!

우리 모모가 기존 제품도 아주 잘 먹고있었다구요!
아주 환장하는 간식중 하나🫶

새로운맛이 나왔다고해서 믹스3종으로 결정
*소고기.닭고기.참치맛으로 기호성 끝판왕*
!게다가!

>강아지를 위한 에너지바
>신선한 휴먼그레이드 원육이 그대로!
>어디서든 간편하게 먹일수있는 개별포장

야외활동시 간편하게 하나씩 챙겨나가 에너지보충을 할수있다구!
reviews.content_en:
First time winning a trial! ㅠㅠㅠ
Honestly I've been getting BITE ME deliveries every day lately, so being selected for their trial team?!

Our Momo already loves the existing products so much!
One of her absolutely favorite treats 🫶

They said a new flavor came out, so I went with the 3-flavor mix
*Beef, chicken, and tuna flavors—ultimate palatability*
And that's not all!

>Energy bar for dogs
>Fresh human-grade raw meat as-is!
>Individual packages for convenient feeding anywhere

You can easily grab one for outdoor activities to give your pup an energy boost!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기호성 good 제품 good
그냥 먹여도 되고 쉽게 손으로 부셔져서 사료 위에
뿌려줘도 되고 너무 잘먹어요
말랑한거 같다가도 은근 딱딱하고 아주 좋아요
양도 넉넉하고 하나하나 개별 포장 되어있고
무엇보다 초록초록 색감 너무 이쁜^^
reviews.content_en:
Great palatability, great product
You can feed it as-is or easily crumble it by hand to sprinkle over kibble—she eats so well
It looks soft but is surprisingly firm and great!
Great portion size and each one is individually wrapped
Best of all, the cute green color ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 샘플로 처음 먹여보는건데 냄새도 고소하고 야채도 쏙쏙 박혀있는게 육안으로 보이는데 애들이 너무 좋아하고 잘먹네요.. 에너지바...이제 쟁여두고 먹여야하나여.. 가격만 좀 더 저렴했으면 얼마나 좋을까요ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Trying the sample for the first time—it smells savory and you can see vegetables packed right in there, and the pups absolutely love it and eat so well.. Energy bar... guess I need to stock up now.. If only the price were a bit lower! ㅎㅎㅎㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
우리먹보는 가리는거없이 다 잘먹어요 ..... 
개별포장이어서 엄청 좋아요 여행가거나 외출할때마다 하나씩 들고나가기만하면돼서 편리해여 무엇보다 믿고먹이는바잇미 간식
reviews.content_en:
Our pup isn't picky and eats everything well.....
So great that it comes in individual packages! Perfect for trips or outings—just grab one each time. Super convenient. Most importantly, BITE ME treats you can trust and feed with confidence

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 오홍! 신상품이 나와서 사봤어요! 우리집 댕댕공쥬는 엄빠가 나갈 준비하고 간식을 주면 먹고 혼자 잘 쉬기 때문에 그 때 주기에 딱 맞는 간식입니당❤️ 이번 간식도 성공❤️ 포장지 뜯자마자 빨리 달라고 쳐다보는 귀야운 뽕이이이이 너무 귀여워ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Ooh! New products came out so I bought them! Our baby princess pup does well resting alone after eating when we're getting ready to leave, so this is the perfect treat for that time! ❤️ Another success! ❤️ As soon as Pongi sees me open the package, she's staring up at me asking for it 🥺🥺🥺 So cute ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 오홍! 신상품이 나와서 사봤어요! 우리집 댕댕공쥬는 엄빠가 나갈 준비하고 간식을 주면 먹고 혼자 잘 쉬기 때문에 그 때 주기에 딱 맞는 간식입니당❤️ 이번 간식도 성공❤️ 포장지 뜯자마자 빨리 달라고 쳐다보는 귀야운 뽕이이이이 너무 귀여워ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: Ooh! New products came out so I bought them! Our baby princess pup does well resting alone after eating when we're getting ready to leave, so this is the perfect treat for that time! ❤️ Another success! ❤️ As soon as Pongi sees me open the package, she's staring up at me asking for it 🥺🥺🥺 So cute ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
일단 알록달록 패키지가 넘 예뻐요🩷
맛이 세가지라 골라 먹는 재미가 좋아보이고 개별 포장 되어있어서 산책 나갈때 간식으로 하나씩 챙겨나가기도 최고! 
에너지 바 이름 답게 먹고나서 에너지 뿜뿜 와다다 날라댕기네요. 장룽지 새로운 간식 성공적!.🧡
reviews.content_en:
First, the colorful packaging is so pretty! 🩷
Three flavors to choose from sounds fun, and since it comes in individual packages, it's perfect to grab one for walks!
True to its name as an energy bar, after eating it Jangryongji zooms around with energy! ✨ Another successful new treat! 🧡

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 웰컴딜로 구매 해봤어요! 델탈껌 엄청 좋아해서 배송오자마자 신나서 킁킁 간식박스인건 어찌 알았을까? 포장은 사람이 먹는 에너지바 같이 생겼어요.먹으면 힘이 날것 같은 느낌적인 느낌.. 신나서 물고가는 보리 너무 잘 먹네요 기호성 체크완료!
reviews.content_en: I bought it with the Welcome Deal! My pup absolutely loves delta chews, so he was so excited when the package arrived—how did he know it was a treat box just from sniffing? 😄 The packaging looks like a human energy bar. It has that vibe like you'd get energy from eating it... Bori is so excited munching on it and eating it really well. Taste preference check: passed! ✅

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 사랑이도 잘 먹고, 임보하는 애기도 잘 먹어요~ 빼빼로데이라 까까파티 벌였습니다^^ 재료 건강하고 너무 딱딱하지 않고~ 크기도 작아서 너무 만족스러워요!
reviews.content_en: Sarang eats it well, and the foster pup also eats it well~ We had a little treat party for Pepero Day^^ The ingredients are healthy and not too hard~ The size is small too, so I'm really satisfied!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
신제품 다이너바이트 맛별로 먹어본 꽁지! 
소고기, 닭고기, 참치 중 꽁지픽은... 셋 다🤭
원육이 통째로 들어가서 기력에도 좋고
개별포장으로 외출할 때 챙겨나가기 편해서
엄마 마음에도 쏙 든 다이너바이트!
기호성은 물론이고 건강한 간식 찾고있다면
꼬오오오옥 먹어보길 추천해요🫶
reviews.content_en:
Kkongji tried the new DINER BITE in different flavors! 🐕
Out of beef, chicken, and tuna... Kkongji's pick is... all three! 🤭
Whole meat pieces go into it, which is great for energy
Individual packaging makes it easy to bring on outings
So the mom's heart is won over by DINER BITE!
If you're looking for a treat with great taste AND healthy ingredients,
I totally recommend giving it a try! 🫶

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
에너지바 오리맛 엄청 좋아하는데 이번에 신제품으로 참치맛이 나왔다고 해서 체험단 신청해봤어요 ! 
역시 너무 잘먹네요!! 개별포장되어있어서 산책갈때 챙겨가기  너무 좋아용 !
reviews.content_en:
My pup really loves the duck-flavored energy bars, and I heard a new tuna flavor came out, so I applied to be a test reviewer!
He eats it so well!! Since it comes in individual packaging, it's super convenient to bring on walks! 🐕

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
평소에도 즐겨먹던 다이너마이트~
새로 출시된 맛들도 기호성 최고네요!
작게 잘라 보상 간식으로 주면, 집중력 최고에요:)
ㅋㅋㅋ든든한 에너지바이기에 캠핑가서도
하나 뜯어서 주면 만족해하네요!
개별포장, 기호성, 건강한 재료 등 최고 간식인 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
DYNAMITE, which we've been enjoying regularly~
The newly released flavors have amazing palatability too!
When I break it into small pieces and give it as a reward treat, he focuses like crazy :)
ㅋㅋㅋ Because it's a hearty energy bar, even when we go camping
he's satisfied with just one! 🏕️
Individual packaging, great taste, healthy ingredients—it's the best treat!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래는 술장고였으나 댕댕이 간식보관 냉장고로 바뀐...ㅎ 바잇미존에 바잇미 간식,영양제 하나하나 채워가는 재미
다이너바이트는 꾸준히 먹이고 있는간식인데 냉장고만 열면 달라고 긁긁 ㅎㅎ 너무 잘먹고 좋아해서 떨어지지않고 채워놓는 간식중에 하나입니다
reviews.content_en:
What used to be a beer fridge is now... a dog treat storage fridge 😄 The fun of filling up the BITE ME Zone with BITE ME treats and supplements one by one
DINER BITE is a treat I consistently give, and every time I open the fridge, he scratches asking for more ㅎㅎ He loves it so much and eats it so well that it's always one of the treats I keep restocked!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
이거 기호성 너무너무너무 좋아요!!
개별포장 되어있어서 애카 갈 때도 한개씩 챙겨가기도 편하구용
기존에 오리랑 연어만 있어서 가금류 알러지가 있어 못먹였는데 소고기맛 출시되서 너무너무 좋네용
reviews.content_en:
The taste preference is SOOO good!!
It comes in individual packaging, so it's convenient to bring one at a time when going places 🐕
There used to be only duck and salmon flavors, so because of poultry allergies he couldn't eat them, but now that beef flavor came out, I'm SO happy! 💕

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 오리 알러지 있어 연어로 두개 구매했어요. 딱딱하지도 않고 그렇다고 이에 붙는 것도 아니고 잘 먹어서 세일 중에 장만했어요. 애초에 하나 더 구매할 걸.. 재구매하러 가니 바로 품절이네요.
reviews.content_en: He has a duck allergy, so I bought two of the salmon flavor. It's not too hard and doesn't stick to teeth either—he eats it well, so I stocked up during the sale. I wish I'd bought one more... now when I try to reorder, it's already sold out! 😭

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content:
두께 얇아진거 너무 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
예전엔 두꺼워서 작게 잘라줘야 먹었었는데 지금은 아주 잘 먹어요! 
낱개포장 되어있어서 어디 놀러 나갈때 간식으로 챙겨가기 딱 좋아요 최고최고🐶💗
reviews.content_en:
Love that it's thinner now!! ㅎㅎ
Before it was thick so I had to cut it up into small pieces for him to eat, but now he eats it really well!
It comes in individual packaging, so it's perfect for bringing as a snack when we go out to play. Awesome awesome! 🐶💗

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 말해 뭐합니까. 워낙 뭐든 잘먹는 아이지만, 이거 먹여본후론 예전에 먹던 다른 간식은 잘 안먹으려하네요. 값싼 뭘로 만든지도 모르는 저급한 간식보단 이런거 쟁여놓고 주는 횟수를 줄이는게 더 좋을거 같아요. 또또또 사러 올게요.
reviews.content_en: What can I say—my pup eats pretty much anything, but since trying this, he doesn't want to eat the other treats he used to have. Rather than cheap, low-quality treats made from who-knows-what, I think it's better to stock treats like this and give them less frequently. I'll be back to buy more again and again!
